briefdescription.para: The main image visual.
True when a property changed and the visual needs rebuilding on the next measure pass.
AnimatedImageViewImpl constructor.
A reference counted object may only be deleted by calling Unreference().
Creates a new AnimatedImageViewImpl.

simplesect.para: An intrusive pointer to the newly allocated AnimatedImageViewImpl

briefdescription.para: Sets the URL of the animated image resource to display.

parameterdescription.para: The URL of the image resource

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the URL of the animated image resource.

simplesect.para: The URL of the image resource

briefdescription.para: Sets an array of image URLs for frame-by-frame animation.

detaileddescription.para: Setting this overrides any single URL set via SetResourceUrl(). The images are played in sequence as animation frames.

parameterdescription.para: Array of image URLs

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the array of image URLs.

simplesect.para: The current array of image URLs, or empty if not set

briefdescription.para: Starts or resumes playback of the animation.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Pauses playback of the animation.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Stops playback of the animation and resets to the first frame.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Sets the number of times the animation should loop.

detaileddescription.para: A value of -1 means infinite looping. A value of 0 means the animation will not play. A positive value specifies an exact loop count.

parameterdescription.para: The loop count (-1 for infinite)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the current loop count.

simplesect.para: The loop count, or -1 for infinite looping

briefdescription.para: Sets the color applied to the image.

parameterdescription.para: The color to apply

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the color applied to the image.

simplesect.para: The current image color

briefdescription.para: Sets how the image is fitted within the view bounds.

detaileddescription.para: The default fitting mode is Ui::FittingMode::FILL (stretch to fill).

parameterdescription.para: The fitting mode to use

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the fitting mode.

simplesect.para: The current fitting mode (default: FILL)

briefdescription.para: Sets the sampling mode used when scaling the image.

parameterdescription.para: The sampling mode to use

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the sampling mode.

simplesect.para: The current sampling mode

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the image is loaded synchronously at the current view size.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable loading image with view size

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether the image is loaded with the view size.

simplesect.para: True if loading image with view size is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets the URL of an alpha mask image.

parameterdescription.para: The URL of the alpha mask image

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the alpha mask image URL.

simplesect.para: The URL of the alpha mask image, or empty string if not set

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the image should be cropped to the mask bounds.

parameterdescription.para: True to crop the image to the mask

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether crop-to-mask is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if crop-to-mask is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets the masking mode.

parameterdescription.para: The masking mode to use

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the masking mode.

simplesect.para: The current masking mode

briefdescription.para: Sets the URL of a placeholder image shown while loading.

parameterdescription.para: The URL of the placeholder image

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the placeholder image URL.

simplesect.para: The URL of the placeholder image, or empty string if not set

briefdescription.para: Jumps to the specified frame number.

parameterdescription.para: The frame index to jump to

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Sets the behavior of the animation when it is stopped.

parameterdescription.para: The stop behavior (CURRENT_FRAME, FIRST_FRAME, or LAST_FRAME)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the current stop behavior.

simplesect.para: The current stop behavior

briefdescription.para: Sets the speed factor for animation playback.

detaileddescription.para: Values between [0, 1] slow down the animation; values above 1 speed it up. The actual clamping to [0.01, 100.0] is handled by the underlying animation renderer.

parameterdescription.para: The speed multiplier (default: 1.0)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the current frame speed factor.

simplesect.para: The frame speed factor

briefdescription.para: Sets the number of frames to pre-load in each batch.

parameterdescription.para: The batch size (default: 1)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the current batch size.

simplesect.para: The batch size

briefdescription.para: Sets the number of frames to keep in cache.

parameterdescription.para: The cache size (default: 1)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the current cache size.

simplesect.para: The cache size

briefdescription.para: Sets the delay in milliseconds between each frame.

detaileddescription.para: Overrides the frame delay embedded in the image file.

parameterdescription.para: The delay between frames in milliseconds

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the current frame delay override.

simplesect.para: The frame delay in milliseconds, or -1 if not overridden

briefdescription.para: Sets the pixel area used to display a sub-region of the image.

detaileddescription.para: The area is specified as normalized coordinates: (x, y, width, height) where each component is in the range [0, 1].

parameterdescription.para: The normalized sub-region of the image to display

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the pixel area.

simplesect.para: The current pixel area as normalized coordinates

briefdescription.para: Gets the current playback state of the animation.

simplesect.para: The current PlayState

briefdescription.para: Gets the current frame number being displayed.

simplesect.para: The current frame index

briefdescription.para: Gets the total number of frames in the animation.

simplesect.para: The total frame count

briefdescription.para: Sets the desired image width used as a hint for the image loader.

parameterdescription.para: The desired width in pixels (0 to use natural size)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the desired image width hint.

simplesect.para: The desired width in pixels, or 0 if not set

briefdescription.para: Sets the desired image height used as a hint for the image loader.

parameterdescription.para: The desired height in pixels (0 to use natural size)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the desired image height hint.

simplesect.para: The desired height in pixels, or 0 if not set

briefdescription.para: Sets the load policy for the image resource.

parameterdescription.para: The load policy to use

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the load policy.

simplesect.para: The current load policy

briefdescription.para: Sets the release policy for the image resource.

parameterdescription.para: The release policy to use

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the release policy.

simplesect.para: The current release policy

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the image is loaded synchronously.

parameterdescription.para: True to load the image on the main thread synchronously

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether synchronous loading is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if synchronous loading is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the image uses pre-multiplied alpha.

parameterdescription.para: True if the image has pre-multiplied alpha

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether pre-multiplied alpha is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if pre-multiplied alpha is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets the depth index for the image.

parameterdescription.para: The depth index to set

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the current loading status of the image.

simplesect.para: The current ResourceStatus of the image visual

briefdescription.para: Returns the signal emitted when the animation finishes all loops.

simplesect.para: A reference to the AnimationFinished signal

briefdescription.para: Called after the actor has been initialized.
Called during measure pass. Override to implement custom measurement.
Called during arrange pass. Override to implement custom arrangement.
Rebuilds and re-registers the image visual from current property values.
Rebuilds and re-registers the placeholder visual.
Applies the current fitting mode to the visual.

parameterdescription.para: The size of the view

briefdescription.para: Called when a visual event signal is emitted.

detaileddescription.para: Used to intercept ANIMATION_FINISHED and forward it as AnimationFinishedSignal.

briefdescription.para: Called when the view's resource becomes ready.

detaileddescription.para: Used to remove placeholder when main image is loaded.

briefdescription.para: This is the internal implementation class for AnimatedImageView.
